entities.name: COWPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping experiments.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop intercropped with cowpea.

entities.name: SHORT SEASON ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by a short growing season.

entities.name: SAHEL
entities.description: The geographical region where the field trials were conducted.

entities.name: PLANTING DATE
entities.description: The timing of sowing the crops.

entities.name: PLANTING PATTERN
entities.description: The spatial arrangement of crops in the field.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops simultaneously on the same field.

entities.name: FIELD TRIALS
entities.description: Experimental studies conducted in the field to test crop performance.

entities.name: EARLY MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of a cultivar that reaches maturity quickly.

entities.name: LATE MATURITY
entities.description: The characteristic of a cultivar that takes longer to reach maturity.

entities.name: CLOSELY SPACED HILLS
entities.description: A planting pattern where hills are placed near each other.

entities.name: WIDELY SPACED HILLS
entities.description: A planting pattern where hills are placed far apart.

entities.name: WEAK COMPETITIVENESS
entities.description: The ability of a crop to avoid competing aggressively with another crop for resources.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced by the crop.

entities.name: FODDER YIELD
entities.description: The amount of forage produced by the crop.
